name: New Orleans Black Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, combine the hot water and molasses, stirring until well blended.
2. Stir in the milk until blended.
3. In a large bowl, sift together the flours, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. With a rubber spatula, fold the liquid mixture and pecans into the dry ingredients just until flour is thoroughly incorporated; do not over mix.
5. Spoon batter into 12 greased muffin cups.
6. Bake at 300°F for 45 minutes to about 1 hour.
7. Remove from pan immediately and serve while hot.
